character.name: EmpireArcher
character.prompt:
Tactics Ogre Let Us Cling Together SNES style chibi enemy archer, western fantasy,
semi-chibi proportion, lean athletic build, grounded mature pose, tactical silhouette,
generic imperial foot archer in european medieval setting,
plain forgettable mook face, lean wiry soldier in his 20s with sharp focused face partially visible,
dark teal green tabard over leather and chainmail light armor, brass and leather trim accents,
open-faced steel nasal kettle hat helmet, no horns, no plume,
brown leather quiver full of feathered arrows strapped on back,
recurved wooden longbow held vertically in left hand, undrawn, brass-bound limbs,
bracer on left forearm, leather glove on right hand, no shield,
16-bit SNES pixel art, muted earthy desaturated palette, hand-painted dithered shading, sharp readable silhouette
